channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 flebonan/WeatherMaster (238 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: flebonan

📝 Repository: flebonan/WeatherMaster

📄 Descrizione: A Weather app for android with multiple sources 🌦🌞☔

]]>

item.title: 📝 zepto-labs/react-native-delta (88 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zepto-labs

📝 Repository: zepto-labs/react-native-delta

📄 Descrizione: The React Native runtime that downloads and applies lightweight delta patches instead of replacing entire bundles. Built for seamless, secure, and production-ready updates with dramatically smaller downloads 🚀.

🍴 Forks: 10

📜 Licenza: Other

item.title: 📝 GokulSB/MFile-Manager (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: GokulSB

📝 Repository: GokulSB/MFile-Manager

📄 Descrizione: MFile Manager is a modern, open-source file explorer for Android built with Jetpack Compose. It focuses on beautiful aesthetics, smooth animations, and native Google Drive integration, providing a premium file management experience without the bloat.

item.title: 📝 ciddwd/overlay-translator (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ciddwd

📝 Repository: ciddwd/overlay-translator

📄 Descrizione: 无 ROOT 的 Android 屏幕实时翻译：截屏 → OCR（ML Kit / PaddleOCR / 百度 / 腾讯）→ LLM/DeepL → 悬浮窗叠加。Real-time on-screen translator for Android (no root): capture → OCR → LLM/DeepL → floating overlay, for games / visual novels / manga.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android deepl jetpack-compose kotlin mediaprojection mlkit ocr paddleocr screen-translation shizuku translation visual-novel

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-22T10:58:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-27T18:37:25Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
